entities.name: Multi-Layered Enforcement
entities.context: An approach that involves multiple layers of rules and systems to enforce architectural principles.

entities.name: User rules
entities.context: First layer of the enforcement approach that involves conditional automatic loading.

entities.name: Command system
entities.context: Second layer related to workflow references.

entities.name: Self-reference
entities.context: Third layer where principles document instructs to load itself.

entities.name: Documentation links
entities.context: Fourth layer involving cross-references throughout the system.

entities.name: Keyword detection
entities.context: Fifth layer that sets up automatic triggers for major work.

relationships.context: User rules are the first layer of the Multi-Layered Enforcement.
Command system is the second layer of the Multi-Layered Enforcement.
Self-reference is the third layer of the Multi-Layered Enforcement.
Documentation links are the fourth layer of the Multi-Layered Enforcement.
Keyword detection is the fifth layer of the Multi-Layered Enforcement.
